sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23891" key="dekatalanti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκᾰτᾰλαντ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sum of ten talents,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:52" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
